mapper.select:
SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0104-01#Sql002 */ A.ORDER_NO MANAGE_NUMBER, A.ORDER_STATUS STATUS, A.TRADE_TYPE TRADE_KBN, A.BRAND_CODE BRAND_CODE, B.BRAND_NAME BRAND_NAME, A.DEPOSIT_TYPE DEPOSIT_TYPE, A.ORDER_TIME ORDER_TIME, A.APPOINT_TIME APPOINT_TIME, A.ORDER_COUNT ORDER_COUNT, A.TRADE_PRICE TRADE_PRICE, A.WARNING_APPLY WARNING_APPLY_TRADE, A.RECALL_REASON CANCEL_REASON FROM T_COUNTER_ORDER A LEFT OUTER JOIN M_COUNTER_BRAND B ON A.BRAND_CODE = B.BRAND_CODE WHERE TRUNC(TO_DATE(A.ORDER_DAY, 'YYYYMMDD' ), 'DD') = TRUNC(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, 'DD')
AND A.BUTEN_CODE = #{req.butenCode} AND A.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(#{req.accountNumber})
AND A.ORDER_NO = #{req.manageNumber}
ORDER BY A.ORDER_TIME DESC,A.BRAND_CODE ASC
SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0104-01#Sql003 */ COUNT(*) count FROM T_COUNTER_ORDER A WHERE A.ORDER_NO = #{req.manageNumber}
SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0104-01#Sql004 */ CCS_AUTH_ID FROM ZERO_SERVICE_STATUS A WHERE A.SYSTEM_ID = 'BONDFX' AND A.SERVICE_ID = 'FCMMF_REFER_CANCEL'
